sections.title: Talking to the Port master after completing Pandemonium

lines.speaker: Port master
lines.text: Hi, sailor. How can I help you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to claim my port task rewards.

lines.speaker: Port master
lines.text: According to my records, you don't have any port task rewards to claim.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to cancel a port task.

lines.speaker: Port master
lines.text: I'm afraid you don't have any assigned tasks for me to cancel.

lines.speaker: Port master
lines.text: There you go. That's all sorted for you.

sections.title: Talking to the Port master before completing Pandemonium

lines.speaker: Port master
lines.text: Hi there. How can I help you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you do around here?

lines.speaker: Port master
lines.text: I'm the port master. It's my job to keep everything around here running nice and smoothly for all the vessels coming and going.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So could you tell me how I could get my own vessel?

lines.speaker: Port master
lines.text: I'm afraid not, but maybe someone else around here could help. I saw a couple of people further north on the docks. I think I heard them saying they were looking for help on their boat.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sounds like quite a challenging job. I'd best not distract you.

sections.title: Claim-rewards or Cancel-task before completing Pandemonium

lines.speaker: Port master
lines.text: I'm afraid I can't help you with that at the moment. You'll have to come back later.

sections.title: Claim-rewards or Cancel-task before Sailing release

lines.speaker: Port master
lines.text: I'm afraid I can't help you with that at the moment. You'll have to come back later.
